source: Tailwind responsive prefixes observed in raw/dom.html (captured 2026-04-08).
note: Only breakpoints actually used by classes serialized in the captured HTML are listed. Hero/Demo/Pricing/FAQ are client-rendered, so their breakpoint usage is not captured here.

occurrences.context: nav primary links: hidden on mobile, flex on sm+
footer row: column on mobile, row on sm+
occurrences.selector: <div class="... flex-col items-center justify-between gap-4 sm:flex-row">

implied_layout_strategy: Mobile-first. Single sm (640px) breakpoint flips nav links from hidden→visible and footer layout from column→row. No md/lg/xl behavior is exercised by the rendered shell — those breakpoints likely live inside the client-only sections.
